subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Three consecutive letters have been received from thee. From their contents it became known
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان سه ٣ نامه از تو متتابعا رسید بدون فاصله از مضامین معلوم گردید که در کلیولند
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity
